heading: Payments to States and counties
label: 7112 Payments to States and counties

(b)(3)(A) and (f)(1) and “the Secure Rural Schools and Community Self-Determination Act of 2000 ( et seq.)” in subsec. (f)(2), meaning , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. County Elections for Fiscal Year 2021 Under the Secure Rural Schools and Community Self-Determination Act of 2000, , , provided that:Pub. L. 117–102, § 1136 Stat. 48Mar. 15, 2022“Sections 102(b)(1)(D), 102(d)(1)(F), and 102(d)(3)(D) of the Secure Rural Schools and Community Self-Determination Act of 2000 (, 7112(d)(1)(F), 7112(d)(3)(D)) shall be applied for fiscal year 2021.”16 U.S.C. 7112(b)(1)(D)

children.label: A
children.text: if the county is eligible for the 25-percent payment, the share of the 25-percent payment; or

children.label: B
children.text: the share of the State payment of the eligible county; and

children.label: A
children.text: if the county is eligible for the 50-percent payment, the 50-percent payment; or

children.label: B
children.text: the county payment for the eligible county.

children.heading: Election to receive payment amount
children.label: b Election to receive payment amount

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The election to receive a share of the State payment, the county payment, a share of the State payment and the county payment, a share of the 25-percent payment, the 50-percent payment, or a share of the 25-percent payment and the 50-percent payment, as applicable, shall be made at the discretion of each affected county by (or as soon thereafter as the Secretary concerned determines is practicable), and August 1 of each second fiscal year thereafter, in accordance with paragraph (2), and transmitted to the Secretary concerned by the Governor of each eligible State.August 1, 2013

children.heading: Failure to transmit
children.label: B Failure to transmit
children.text: If an election for an affected county is not transmitted to the Secretary concerned by the date specified under subparagraph (A), the affected county shall be considered to have elected to receive a share of the State payment, the county payment, or a share of the State payment and the county payment, as applicable.

children.heading: Effect of late payment for fiscal years 2014 and 2015
children.label: C Effect of late payment for fiscal years 2014 and 2015
children.text: The election otherwise required by subparagraph (A) shall not apply for fiscal year 2014 or 2015.

children.heading: Payments for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020
children.label: D Payments for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020
children.text: The election otherwise required by subparagraph (A) shall not apply for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020.1See County Elections for Fiscal Year 2021 Under the Secure Rural Schools and Community Self-Determination Act of 2000 note below.1

children.heading: Payments for each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025
children.label: E Payments for each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025
children.text: The election otherwise required by subparagraph (A) shall not apply for each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: A county election to receive a share of the 25-percent payment or 50-percent payment, as applicable, shall be effective for 2 fiscal years. If such two-fiscal year period included fiscal year 2013, the county election to receive a share of the 25-percent payment or 50-percent payment, as applicable, also shall be effective for fiscal years 2014 and 2015 and for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020.

children.heading: Full funding amount
children.label: B Full funding amount
children.text: If a county elects to receive a share of the State payment or the county payment in 2013, the election shall be effective for all subsequent fiscal years through fiscal year 2015 and for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020.

children.heading: Fiscal years 2024 and 2025
children.label: C Fiscal years 2024 and 2025
children.text: The election described in paragraph (1)(A) applicable to a county in fiscal year 2023 shall be effective for each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025.

children.label: A
children.text: any amounts that are appropriated to carry out this chapter;

children.label: B
children.text: any revenues, fees, penalties, or miscellaneous receipts, exclusive of deposits to any relevant trust fund, special account, or permanent operating funds, received by the Federal Government from activities by the Bureau of Land Management or the Forest Service on the applicable Federal land; and

children.label: C
children.text: to the extent of any shortfall, out of any amounts in the Treasury of the United States not otherwise appropriated.

children.heading: Distribution and expenditure of payments
children.label: c Distribution and expenditure of payments
A
children.text: the Act of (); andMay 23, 190816 U.S.C. 500

children.label: B
children.text: (; ).section 13 of the Act of March 1, 191136 Stat. 96316 U.S.C. 500

children.heading: Expenditure purposes
children.label: 2 Expenditure purposes
children.text: Subject to subsection (d), payments received by a State under subsection (a) and distributed to counties in accordance with paragraph (1) shall be expended as required by the laws referred to in paragraph (1).

children.heading: Expenditure rules for eligible counties
children.label: d Expenditure rules for eligible counties

children.heading: Use of portion in same manner as 25-percent payment or 50-percent payment, as applicable
children.label: A Use of portion in same manner as 25-percent payment or 50-percent payment, as applicable
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (D), if an eligible county elects to receive its share of the State payment or the county payment, not less than 80 percent, but not more than 85 percent, of the funds shall be expended in the same manner in which the 25-percent payments or 50-percent payment, as applicable, are required to be expended.

children.heading: Election as to use of balance
children.label: B Election as to use of balance
i
children.text: Reserve any portion of the balance for projects in accordance with subchapter II.

children.label: ii
children.text: Reserve any portion of the balance for projects in accordance with subchapter III.

children.label: iii
children.text: Return the portion of the balance not reserved under clauses (i) and (ii) to the Treasury of the United States.

children.label: i
children.text: Reserve any portion of the balance for projects in accordance with subchapter II.

children.label: ii
children.text: Reserve not more than 7 percent of the total share for the eligible county of the State payment or the county payment for projects in accordance with subchapter III.

children.label: iii
children.text: Return the portion of the balance not reserved under clauses (i) and (ii) to the Treasury of the United States.

children.heading: Counties with minor distributions
children.label: D Counties with minor distributions
children.text: In the case of each eligible county to which less than $100,000 is distributed for any fiscal year pursuant to either or both of paragraphs (1)(B) and (2)(B) of subsection (a), the eligible county may elect to expend all the funds in the same manner in which the 25-percent payments or 50-percent payments, as applicable, are required to be expended.

children.heading: Effect of late payment for fiscal year 2014
children.label: E Effect of late payment for fiscal year 2014
children.text: The election made by an eligible county under subparagraph (B), (C), or (D) for fiscal year 2013, or deemed to be made by the county under paragraph (3)(B) for that fiscal year, shall be effective for fiscal years 2014 and 2015.

children.heading: Payments for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020
children.label: F Payments for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020
children.text: The election made by an eligible county under subparagraph (B), (C), or (D) for fiscal year 2013, or deemed to be made by the county under paragraph (3)(B) for that fiscal year, shall be effective for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020.1

children.heading: Payments for each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025
children.label: G Payments for each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025
children.text: The election made by an eligible county under subparagraph (B), (C), or (D) for fiscal year 2023, or deemed to be made by the county under paragraph (3)(B) for that fiscal year, shall be effective for each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Funds reserved by an eligible county under subparagraph (B)(i) or (C)(i) of paragraph (1) for carrying out projects under subchapter II shall be deposited in a special account in the Treasury of the United States.

children.label: i
children.text: be available for expenditure by the Secretary concerned, without further appropriation; and

children.label: ii
children.text: remain available until expended in accordance with subchapter II.

children.heading: Notification
children.label: A Notification
children.text: The Governor of each eligible State shall notify the Secretary concerned of an election by an eligible county under this subsection not later than , and each September 30 thereafter for each succeeding fiscal year.September 30, 2012

children.label: i
children.text: the eligible county shall be considered to have elected to expend 80 percent of the funds in accordance with paragraph (1)(A); and

children.label: ii
children.text: the remainder shall be available to the Secretary concerned to carry out projects in the eligible county to further the purposes described in , , or .section 7122(b) of this titlesection 7123(c) of this titlesection 7124(a)(5) of this title

children.heading: Effect of late payment for fiscal year 2014
children.label: C Effect of late payment for fiscal year 2014
children.text: This paragraph does not apply for fiscal years 2014 and 2015.

children.heading: Payments for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020
children.label: D Payments for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020
children.text: This paragraph does not apply for each of fiscal years 2017 through 2020.1

children.heading: Payments for each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025
children.label: E Payments for each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025
children.text: This paragraph does not apply for each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025.

children.heading: Time for payment
children.label: e Time for payment
children.text: The payments required under this section for a fiscal year shall be made as soon as practicable after the end of that fiscal year.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: None of the funds made available to an eligible county under this chapter may be used in lieu of, or to otherwise offset, a State funding source for a local school, facility, or educational purpose.

children.heading: Continuation of direct payments
children.label: 2 Continuation of direct payments
children.text: Payments to States made under this chapter and 25-percent payments made to States and Territories under the Acts of , and (), shall continue to be made as direct payments and not as Federal financial assistance.May 23, 1908March 1, 191116 U.S.C. 500
